one_liner: SOUN +3.25% to $6.68 in Accumulation Phase B with slightly above-average volume (1.04x) — voice AI plays recovering as enterprise software gets re-rated.

price_action.intraday_story: SOUN touched $7.01 intraday before closing at $6.68. The $7 level acted as resistance. The 1.04x volume is mild but positive.

news_catalyst.headline: SoundHound trading up alongside broader AI software recovery from enterprise SaaS re-rating
news_catalyst.summary: SOUN benefits from the same Guggenheim-driven enterprise software re-rating that lifted TTD today. Voice AI platform plays are gaining as the market distinguishes between AI infrastructure (hurt by Meta cloud) and AI application software (benefiting from it).

technical.summary: Accumulation Phase B. Watch the $7 resistance — a clean close above $7 on volume 1.5x+ would be bullish.

wyckoff_narrative: Phase B accumulation with $7 resistance. Enterprise AI software re-rating is the catalyst.

valuation.summary: DCF not feasible — pre-profitability voice AI company.

key_strengths: Voice AI platform with automotive and restaurant partnerships
key_concerns: Competing with Big Tech voice AI (Amazon Alexa, Google Assistant, Apple Siri)
fundamentals.summary: Speculative AI software play. Phase B accumulation setup is real but fundamental support is limited.

risks: $7 resistance is a near-term ceiling — break below $6.50 reinvites sellers
Pre-profitability means any revenue miss causes disproportionate selloff
